name: Fettucini Alfredo (Low Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chicken stock to boiling over high heat.
2. Add and cook noodles until tender but firm to bite, about 12 minutes. Drain and set aside (save the broth for soup).
3. In a small bowl, mix together sour cream and yogurt until smooth. Set aside.
4. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Add and sauté garlic for 1 minute. Reduce heat to low.
6. Add the yogurt mixture, blending well, then add noodles and toss gently until sauce is evenly distributed.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Makes 8 (1/2 cup) servings.
